findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Transaction-wrapped delete+insert per row into vec_memories virtual table (lines 370-381). Uses db.transaction, DELETE FROM vec_memories WHERE rowid, INSERT INTO vec_memories(rowid, embedding). Blocks Turso migration.
CONFIRMED: Probes sqlite_master for memory_fts table existence; gates FTS5 vs in-memory BM25 engine selection. Turso migration must replace this with alternative lexical engine detection.
CONFIRMED: ATTACH/DETACH used for 3-database migration (legacy→canonical→shard) at lines 243-244, 272-273. Turso has no ATTACH — requires architectural redesign.

CONFIRMED: Creates vec0 virtual table in attached shard (line 72: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE shard.vec_memories USING vec0) and copies rows via INSERT. Also uses loadExtension via sqliteVec.load at line 242. Turso has no vec0, no ATTACH, no loadExtension.
CONFIRMED: FTS5 'delete-all' command used in clearTable() function. Turso/libSQL lacks FTS5; must reimplement.
CONFIRMED: FTS5 'rebuild' command used in runDerivedArtifactRebuilds (line 1930). FTS5 not available in Turso.

findings.signature: function restoreCheckpointV2(database, checkpoint, scope, opts): RestoreResult
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: v2 restore is entirely file-copy based (lines 2689-2707: fs.renameSync live→backup, fs.copyFileSync snapshot→live). Turso remote DB cannot fs.copyFileSync — needs API-level redesign.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM INTO on attached database (active_vec) at line 2284. Turso lacks ATTACH and VACUUM INTO; vector shard snapshot needs complete reimplementation.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM INTO is SQLite-specific; used at line 2281 for v2 checkpoint creation. Turso/libSQL does not support it.

findings.signature: SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='memory_fts'
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: FTS5 virtual table existence probe in verifyFts5Isolation(). Turso lacks FTS5 — this check and all memory_fts consumers must be replaced or gated.
CONFIRMED: Direct better-sqlite3 driver import. Every call site couples to the synchronous better-sqlite3 API. Turso uses @libsql/client.
CONFIRMED: Three .pragma() calls at lines 299-301. libSQL lacks .pragma() method — must use db.exec('PRAGMA ...') or connection string params.
CONFIRMED: loadExtension in reindex shard writer at line 430. Turso blocks extension loading — reindex cannot populate vec0 KNN table.
CONFIRMED: Three .pragma() calls at lines 147-149. libSQL has no .pragma() API — requires exec-based pragma or connection config.
CONFIRMED: FTS5 optimize command at line 343. Turso has no FTS5 — must remove or replace.
CONFIRMED: loadExtension during shard migration at line 242. Turso blocks extension loading — migration logic cannot create vec0 tables.
CONFIRMED: sqlite-vec scalar function used in vector_search (line 314), multi_concept_search (lines 403, 407). Turso has no vec_distance_cosine — must compute externally.
REFUTED: The schema creates FTS5 virtual table but does NOT use bm25() ranking function. The in-memory BM25 is in bm25-index.ts. vector-index-schema.ts creates FTS5 table and triggers only. kind=gap

findings.symbol: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE memory_fts USING fts5
findings.signature: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE memory_fts USING fts5(title, trigger_phrases, file_path, content_text, content='memory_index', content_rowid='id')
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: FTS5 virtual table + 3 sync triggers (insert/update/delete) at lines 1256-1281. Turso lacks FTS5 — full-text search must use external engine.

findings.signature: FTS5 virtual table for BM25 full-text search
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: FTS5 virtual table memory_fts used for BM25 full-text search. Turso lacks FTS5 — must use external search engine.

CONFIRMED: sqliteVec.load(database) at line 1090 loads the extension which registers vec_distance_cosine. The function is used in queries in vector-index-queries.ts. Must be reimplemented if Turso lacks vec extension.
CONFIRMED: FTS5 delete-all command at line 1606. Turso/libSQL has no FTS5 — must replace with external search or Trigram/other index.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM INTO on attached shard. Turso cannot attach databases or VACUUM INTO; snapshot strategy must change entirely.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM INTO is SQLite-specific snapshot mechanism. Turso/libSQL lacks this — must replace with serialize()/file-copy or Turso snapshot API.
CONFIRMED: Full FTS5 virtual table creation with content-sync triggers and rebuild at lines 203-235. Turso has no FTS5 or loadExtension — blocks schema downgrade path.
CONFIRMED: .pragma() calls at lines 270-272 (busy_timeout, journal_mode, foreign_keys). Turso/libSQL has no .pragma() method; must set via connection config or PRAGMA SQL.
CONFIRMED: WAL triplet file model. All copy/move/restore logic (copyTriplet, moveTriplet, restoreTriplet) becomes obsolete with Turso remote replicas.
CONFIRMED: integrity_check pragma at line 128 is local SQLite; Turso has no embedded integrity check — recovery procedure CG-RP-001 must be redesigned.

findings.signature: async function retryEmbedding(id, content, claimedPreviousStatus): Promise<RetryResult>
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: retryEmbedding writes to vec_memories (lines 756-762: DELETE FROM vec_memories WHERE rowid, INSERT INTO vec_memories(rowid, embedding)). vec_memories is a vec0 virtual table — Turso/libSQL has NO vector index support; this is a migration blocker.

findings.signature: WITH RECURSIVE causal_walk(origin_id, node_id, hop_distance, walk_score) AS ...
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Recursive CTE with bidirectional UNION seed + UNION ALL recursive step traversing causal_edges up to MAX_HOPS(2). Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE.

CONFIRMED: Core recursive CTE for graph traversal with bidirectional edges and relation-weighted scoring at lines 431-468. Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE — must rewrite as iterative application-side traversal.

findings.signature: WITH RECURSIVE causal_walk AS (SELECT ... UNION SELECT ... UNION ALL SELECT ...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Recursive CTE for graph traversal (2-hop) at line 431. Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE — must be replaced with iterative application-side traversal or bounded expansion.

findings.signature: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE memory_fts USING fts5(...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: FTS5 virtual table for BM25 full-text search. Turso/libSQL lacks FTS5; entire FTS search path blocks migration.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM INTO is the core v2 checkpoint snapshot mechanism at line 2281. Turso/libSQL lacks this — blocks checkpoint creation as-is.

findings.signature: WITH RECURSIVE dependents(child_path) AS (SELECT ... UNION SELECT ...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Recursive CTE for transitive dependency closure at lines 192-204. Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE; collectDependents() and wouldCreateCycle() both depend on this.

findings.signature: WITH RECURSIVE dependents(child_path) AS (SELECT child_path FROM dependency_edges WHERE parent_path IN (...) UNION SELECT edge.child_path FROM dependency_edges edge JOIN dependents dep ON edge.parent_path = dep.child_path)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Recursive CTE for transitive dependency closure (cycle detection + invalidation) at lines 192-204. Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE — must rewrite as iterative BFS.
